Hi Emmanuele, good to see you. Can you give me a quick status of the Brazilian launch?
Hi David. Sure. Right now, my team is running the launch in three regions.
Great. And how is the market? What are you seeing on the ground?
At the moment, we are seeing good growth in the South. Our reps are visiting doctors every day.
Are you facing any challenges right now?
Yes, one. We are handling a small access problem, so we are adjusting the plan this week.
Good. And are you monitoring the results?
Yes, we are monitoring everything in real time. I am tracking the numbers every day.
Right now, my team is running the launch.
Our reps are on the ground, visiting doctors.
We are handling a challenge, so we are adjusting the plan.

Good morning, team. Here is a quick update on where we are right now. The launch is going well. In the South, our reps are visiting more than twenty doctors a day, and we are seeing strong growth. In the Southeast, the situation is a little different. Access is slow, so we are adjusting our plan this week. Right now, I am monitoring the numbers in real time, and I am tracking every region on one dashboard. One team is handling the private market, and another team is running the campaign in the public sector. Please send me your field reports by Friday. We are all on the ground, and we are moving fast. Thank you.

Hi Emmanuele, it's Claire, from the Global team. I am calling about our meeting this afternoon. The VP wants a quick status of the Brazil launch, so please be ready. He is going to ask what is happening right now, in real time, not last month's numbers. So, three things. First, tell him what your team is doing on the ground this week. Second, mention the challenges you are handling and how you are adjusting the plan. And third, show that you are monitoring the results closely. Keep it short and clear. You are doing great work down there. See you at three.

Hi David, thanks for the call. Let me give you a quick status. Right now, my team is running the launch in three regions. At the moment, we are seeing good growth in the South. We are handling one challenge, so we are adjusting the plan this week. We are monitoring the results in real time.
